title: Social Innovation Advisory Council - Canada.ca
content:
## Social Innovation Advisory Council
To help advance Canada’s Social Innovation and Social Finance (SI/SF) Strategy , the Government of Canada created the Social Innovation Advisory Council (SIAC). Its strategic advice will help to inform the Government of Canada’s path towards:
- advancing inclusive social innovation and social finance approaches
- supporting the growth of social purpose organizations in Canada, including charities, non-profits, social enterprises, co-operatives and businesses with a social mission
Some key priorities that the SIAC will focus on include:
- the remaining recommendations of the SI/SF Strategy Co-Creation Steering Group from their 2018 report, Inclusive Innovation
- the future direction on the SI/SF Strategy initiatives that the Government of Canada is currently implementing
- emerging issues of relevance to the SI/SF Strategy and social purpose organizations in Canada

## About the Social Innovation Advisory Council
- Email: EDSC.CCIS-SIAC.ESDC@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
